texto: ...Having felt the piercing gash of grief and lived through it, having loved to the brink of brokenness, and having learned the difference between friendship and frivolity, one eventually takes a conscious step through the invisible membrane that separates hubris from humility...
explicacao: Citação de Eldonna Edwards sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “...Having felt the piercing gash of grief and lived through it, having loved to the brink of brok…” articula amizade, memoir, reflexao em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.
